title: Gandhari khilla
tagline: Gandhari khilla — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Gandhari khilla is a hill fort located near Bokkalagutta, in Mandamarri Mandal in Mancherial district in the Indian state of Telangana.
overview.description: Gandhari khilla is a hill fort located near Bokkalagutta, in Mandamarri Mandal in Mancherial district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is located on the sand rock hills. It is 270 kilometres (157 mi) north east of the state capital, Hyderabad. The fort was built within a thickly forested area which has a wealth of plant species which includes many medicinal herbs.

topPlaces.name: Kyathanpally
topPlaces.description: Kyathanpally is a census town and a municipality in Mancherial district of the Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Mandamarri
topPlaces.description: Mandamarri is a town municipality and mandal located in Mancherial district in the Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Mancherial
topPlaces.description: Mancherial, natively spelt as Mancheryala, is a city and headquarters of the Mancherial district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is both the district and administrative headquarters of Mancherial mandal in the Mancherial revenue division.

items.note: Kyathanpally is a census town and a municipality in Mancherial district of the Indian state of Telangana.
Mandamarri is a town municipality and mandal located in Mancherial district in the Indian state of Telangana.

Mancherial, natively spelt as Mancheryala, is a city and headquarters of the Mancherial district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is both the district and administrative headquarters of Mancherial mandal in the Mancherial revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gandhari khilla?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gandhari khilla is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gandhari khilla?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (217 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (194 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gandhari khilla?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gandhari khilla at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gandhari khilla?
faq.a: Stays in Gandhari khilla start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gandhari khilla?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kyathanpally, Mandamarri, Mancherial.
